No clear impairment-like signals can be confidently extracted. Further observation or formal screening is recommended.

risk_control_suggestions: Repeat the picture description task with clearer audio recording
Use visual cues or written prompts to support patient response
Consider formal cognitive screening if this is part of a longitudinal assessment
